title: He's a Flamebaiter
overview: Soji Enishiro streams inflammatory content to make money for his family. Until one day, everything changes...

title: Miden Academy
overview: Soji wakes up at Miden Academy, a training facility for exorcists that wants to recruit him.

title: Cyberkinesis Output Test
overview: In order to attend Miden Academy and achieve his goal, Soji must learn to control his flame.

title: The Worst Trio Possible
overview: Soji's first mission alongside bickering Kasubata and Urusugawa runs into an unforeseen complication.

title: The Anachronistic Exorcist
overview: An ambush by Sad Boy K has Soji on the ropes until a timely run-in by a powerful exorcist.

title: An Encounter In the Mountains
overview: Soji gets training from Haijima and learns more about his team in preparation for a major school contest.

title: The A-B Battle
overview: The grudge match between, with Class 1-B hoping to make up for an earlier, devastating loss to Class 1-A.

title: Open the Window, and...
overview: When Class 1-B ends up divided, Hasumi struggles to reunite with Kasubata before all hope is lost.

title: The Battle at Sainokawara
overview: While Hasumi races to save Kasubata, Soji and Urusugawa face off against their rivals.

title: He's a Freezer-type
overview: Soji and Kasubata's battles resolve, but a fearsome enemy still awaits the weakened squad.

title: The A-B Alliance
overview: Soji's options continue to narrow as he faces a fallen former classmate.

title: The Hot Springs Town After the Thaw
overview: The battle with the ghost account reaches its climax, and the survivors deal with the aftermath.
